exterior.name: Gutters and downpipes
exterior.reason: Blocked gutters cause water damage to walls and foundations

exterior.name: Retaining walls
exterior.reason: Structural failure is costly — regular inspection needed

exterior.name: Deck or pergola
exterior.reason: Timber decks need oiling and termite checks

exterior.name: Pool or spa
exterior.reason: Requires regular chemical balancing and pump maintenance

HVAC.name: Ducted heating system
HVAC.reason: Annual service critical for gas safety

HVAC.name: Split system air conditioner
HVAC.reason: Filter cleaning every 3 months improves efficiency

plumbing.name: Hot water system
plumbing.reason: Anode replacement every 5 years prevents tank failure

plumbing.name: Sump pump
plumbing.reason: Failure during a storm causes flooding — test annually

electrical.name: Smoke alarms
electrical.reason: Battery replacement every 12 months — legally required

electrical.name: Switchboard / circuit breakers
electrical.reason: Inspect for signs of burning or outdated fuses

electrical.name: EV charger
electrical.reason: Track installation date and cable condition

appliances.name: Refrigerator
appliances.reason: Coil cleaning and filter replacement often missed

appliances.name: Dryer
appliances.reason: Lint trap and duct cleaning is a fire hazard if missed

plants_trees.name: Front garden trees
plants_trees.reason: Large trees near structures need regular arborist check

plants_trees.name: Fruit trees
plants_trees.reason: Pruning, fertilising and pest management are seasonal

plants_trees.name: Garden beds
plants_trees.reason: Mulching and fertilising calendar keeps them productive

vehicle.name: Car
vehicle.reason: Service and registration reminders are high-value
